lines.speaker: Annette
lines.text: Can I help you with drift net storage, human?

lines.speaker: Annette
lines.text: My aunt lets people come in here to catch the fish. Sometimes they have trouble carrying enough stuff, so I help by holding onto spare drift nets for them.

lines.speaker: Annette
lines.text: It's a free service to help more of you humans use Ceto's cave; she's paying me, so you don't have to. So can I help you with your drift nets?
